name: Difficult Teammate (Behavioral)
transcript: [INTERVIEWER]: Tell me about a time you had to deal with a difficult teammate. How did you handle it?

name: URL Shortener (System Design)
transcript: [INTERVIEWER]: How would you design a URL shortening service like Bitly that scales to 1M requests per day?

name: Code Screenshot Optimization
transcript: [USER]: What should I say about this specific function on my screen?

name: Action Items from Sync
transcript: [ME]: So we agreed on the Q3 roadmap. [PERSON A]: Yes, I will take the API refactor. [PERSON B]: And I will handle the UI migration. [ME]: Great, let's meet next Tuesday.

name: Screenshot + Resume Grounding
transcript: [INTERVIEWER]: Based on your experience and this job description on the screen, why are you a good fit?

context.resume: Experienced Full Stack Engineer with 5 years in React and Node.js. Built high-scale fintech apps.
context.jd_text: Looking for a React expert to build banking applications.
